---
title: "Art"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
freeze: true
echo: false
lightbox: true
---

(Click on image to enlarge)

## Barney watercolours

Barney (4/2011 - 6/2025) my great friend, running partner, and favorite muse

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1], [1]]"}
![Resting after a busy day](photos/images/BA2F5DDA-A4BB-404F-8013-02EC29CEA548_1_105_c.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Pround profile](photos/images/barn.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Enjoying the sunshine](photos/images/barn1.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}
:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1], [1]]"}
![Waiting for Santa](photos/images/barn5.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Still waiting](photos/images/barn6.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Looking good](photos/images/barn7.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}


:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1,1], [1]]"}
![With a friend](photos/images/barn2.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Snoozing](photos/images/barn3.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Snoozing with a friend](photos/images/barn4.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}
:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1], [1]]"}
![Post swim at 3 months](photos/images/barney_3months.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Just relaxing](photos/images/barn8.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Proud portrait (one of dozens)](photos/images/barn9.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

:::

## Barney iPad drawings
(Click on image to enlarge)

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Stately](photos/images/barni.png){group="gallery" description="iPad drawings" width="200"}

![Where is everyone?](photos/images/barni1.jpeg){group="gallery" description="iPad drawings"}


![Waiting for ...](photos/images/barni2.jpg){group="gallery" description="iPad drawings"}

![Hiking](photos/images/barney_ipad.jpeg){group="gallery" description="iPad drawings" width="200"}

:::

## Barney photos

![In action](photos/images/barney_collage.jpg){group="gallery"}

## Maggie watercolours

Maggie (10/2021 - arrived here 4/2026) new friend, running partner, and muse

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1], [1]]"}
![First portrait](photos/images/Maggie1.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Second portrait](photos/images/Maggie2.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Third portrait](photos/images/Maggie3.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}
:::

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1], [1]]"}
![Standing tall](photos/images/MaggieChecking1.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Checking it out](photos/images/MaggieChecking2.jpg){group="gallery" description=""}

![Snoozing post run](photos/images/MaggieChecking3.jpeg){group="gallery" description=""}
:::


## Other paintings

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![Flowers](photos/images/flowers.jpg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Poppies](photos/images/poppies.jpg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Flowers1](photos/images/flowers1.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}





![Sheep](photos/images/sheep.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Sheep1](photos/images/sheep1.jpg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Sheep2](photos/images/sheep2.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Sons & grandsons](photos/images/sons.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Sons & grandsons1](photos/images/sons2.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Grandson](photos/images/jake.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Bunny](photos/images/Bunny.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![From Sargent](photos/images/sargent.jpg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Waterfall](photos/images/waterfall.jpeg){group="gallery"}



![Winter](photos/images/winter1.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Winter1](photos/images/winter2.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Winter2](photos/images/winter3.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}



![Zuna](photos/images/zuna.jpg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Zuna1](photos/images/zuna2.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Zuna2](photos/images/zuna3.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Zuna & Barney](photos/images/zuna_barney.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Venice](photos/images/Venice.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}

![Venice1](photos/images/venice1.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Sintra Portugal](photos/images/Portugal.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200"}


![Westmount library](photos/images/westmount.jpeg){group="gallery" description="" width="200" height="300"}
:::
